inlineCompletions.description: Common flex centering pattern — centers items both vertically and horizontally.
Flex row with vertically centered items spaced between — common navbar/header layout.
3-column responsive grid with gap — common card/gallery layout pattern.
Responsive grid: 1 column on mobile, 2 on tablet, 3 on desktop.
Card component pattern — rounded corners, shadow, padding, white background.

inlineCompletions.insertText: px-4 py-2 bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-600 transition
inlineCompletions.description: Button component pattern — padded, colored, rounded with hover transition.
Common dark mode background and text color pairing.
Interactive hover state with background change, shadow, and smooth transition.
Accessible focus ring pattern — removes outline, adds visible ring indicator.
Full-height page layout pattern with flex column for sticky footer.
Standard Tailwind CSS entry point — includes all three directive layers.
Component layer with reusable button class using @apply.
Centered container with horizontal padding — common page wrapper pattern.
Horizontal gradient background from blue to purple.
Screen-reader only — visually hides element while keeping it accessible.
Full-height flex column layout — common for page shell with sticky header/footer.
Flex row with centered items, gap, and padding — toolbar/action bar pattern.

inlineCompletions.insertText: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6
inlineCompletions.description: Responsive grid: 1→2→3→4 columns across breakpoints — product/card grid.
12-column layout grid with gap — traditional columnar layout.
Absolute position filling parent — overlay pattern.

inlineCompletions.insertText: absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50
inlineCompletions.description: Centered overlay with semi-transparent background — modal backdrop.
Fixed top bar — sticky header/navbar pattern.
Fixed bottom-right FAB — floating action button pattern.
Sticky header with glass morphism — frosted glass navbar.
Relative container with hidden overflow and rounding — image card pattern.
Responsive centered container — standard page width wrapper with responsive padding.
Centered card/form wrapper — medium-width centered content.
Video container — 16:9 ratio with rounded corners and clipped overflow.

inlineCompletions.insertText: px-6 py-3 bg-blue-600 text-white font-medium rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:bg-blue-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:ring-offset-2 transition-colors
inlineCompletions.description: Fully accessible button — padded, colored, rounded with hover, focus ring, and transition.

inlineCompletions.insertText: border rounded-lg p-4 bg-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
inlineCompletions.description: Interactive card — bordered, rounded, padded with hover shadow lift.
Card component — white background, large rounded corners, shadow, spaced content.
Dark mode adaptive — light/dark background and text pair.
Hover zoom effect — subtle scale up with smooth transition.

inlineCompletions.insertText: hover:bg-blue-700 active:bg-blue-800 focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-blue-500 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 transition-colors
inlineCompletions.description: Full interactive state stack — hover, active, and focus-visible states with transition.
Group parent setup — enables group-hover/group-focus on children.

inlineCompletions.insertText: group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:translate-y-0 transition-all duration-200 opacity-0 translate-y-2
inlineCompletions.description: Group hover reveal — element slides up and fades in when parent is hovered.
Peer sibling marker — enables peer-* variants on subsequent siblings.
Peer checked state — styled label/toggle that reacts to checkbox state.
Floating label pattern — label moves up and changes color when input is focused.
Disabled state — reduces opacity and disables interaction.
ARIA expanded rotation — icon rotates when element is expanded (accordion/dropdown).
Responsive flex row from sm — stack on mobile, row with space-between on tablet+.
Responsive grid columns — 2 columns on tablet, 3 on desktop.
Responsive direction — column on mobile/tablet, row on desktop.
Mobile-hidden — hidden on mobile, visible from sm breakpoint.
Desktop-hidden — visible on mobile only.
Responsive typography — text scales up across breakpoints.
Responsive padding — padding increases across breakpoints.
Responsive gap — gap size increases across breakpoints.
Base layer with global defaults — smooth scroll, antialiased text, dark mode body.
Utility layer with custom utilities — balanced text wrap and hidden scrollbar.
Before pseudo-element overlay — empty content, absolutely positioned to fill parent.

inlineCompletions.insertText: after:content-[''] after:absolute after:bottom-0 after:left-0 after:h-0.5 after:w-full after:bg-blue-500 after:scale-x-0 hover:after:scale-x-100 after:transition-transform
inlineCompletions.description: Animated underline — expanding line on hover using ::after pseudo-element.
Accessible animation — bounces for users who allow motion, static for those who don't.
Print-hidden — hides element when printing.
Styled placeholder — gray italic placeholder text.

inlineCompletions.insertText: file:mr-4 file:py-2 file:px-4 file:rounded-lg file:border-0 file:bg-blue-50 file:text-blue-700 file:font-medium hover:file:bg-blue-100 file:cursor-pointer
inlineCompletions.description: Styled file input button — rounded, colored file selector button with hover.
Custom text selection — blue highlight with dark text.
Custom list markers — blue bullet points.

inlineCompletions.insertText: snap-x snap-mandatory overflow-x-auto flex gap-4 scroll-smooth
inlineCompletions.description: Horizontal scroll snap carousel — flex row with mandatory snap points.
Carousel item — snaps to start, doesn't shrink, fixed width.
Glass morphism — frosted glass effect with backdrop blur and semi-transparent background.
Striped rows — alternating row backgrounds for tables/lists.
Boundary margin reset — removes top margin from first and bottom margin from last child.
Data state animations — animate in/out based on open/closed data attribute.
Parent styling from child state — parent highlights when child checkbox is checked.
